name: Frame
goal: Lock any child media element to a fixed aspect ratio and crop or letterbox it to fill the frame.
description: Locked aspect-ratio container that constrains img, video, iframe, canvas, and picture children. Supports six standard ratios (1:1, 4:3, 16:9, 21:9, 3:4, golden) and two fill modes (cover crops to fill; contain letterboxes to fit). Pure CSS — no JavaScript required.
limitations: ::slotted(img) only matches direct slot children; wrapping the img in another element prevents object-fit from reaching it. iframes do not honour object-fit and always fill 100%×100% regardless of the fit attribute — letterboxing iframes requires the iframe's own viewport settings.

props.name: ratio
props.description: Aspect ratio of the frame. golden maps to 1.618:1.

props.name: fit
props.description: How img/video/picture fill the frame. cover crops to fill; contain letterboxes.

slots.description: The media element to constrain: img, video, iframe, canvas, or picture.

cssVariables.name: --ce-bg
cssVariables.description: Frame background color shown in letterbox bars or before media loads. Defaults to transparent when token is absent.

a11y.notes: ce-frame has no inherent ARIA role; it is a presentational container. Accessible names and roles belong on the slotted media element (alt text on img, track elements on video, title on iframe).
